title: Narrow Highway claim packet
description: The minimal structural contract for a packet entering the engine. A packet MUST be an object naming its verifier domain; domain-specific fields are allowed (additionalProperties). Enforced at the RED gate: a packet failing this is malformed input and is rejected before any verifier runs. With jsonschema installed the full constraints apply; without it, the sovereign fallback enforces required-fields + object-type.

domain.description: the verifier domain to route to (e.g. mathematics, chemistry, combinatorics)

claim.description: optional human statement of the claim being checked

created_epoch.description: unix seconds when the packet was created; required to seal (the WAIT gate)

scope.description: wait-window scope; controls how long before the packet may seal
